chief_complaint: A 35-year-old male presented with recurrent ischemic stroke.
history: The patient had a history of recurrent ischemic stroke without any prior cardiac problems. Cardiac investigations were not performed initially, leading to a delayed diagnosis of left atrial myxoma.
exam: Vital signs were not provided. Physical examination findings were not mentioned.
labs: Echocardiography revealed a left atrial myxoma.
